The '''Fey family''' was a powerful [[Human/Legends|Human]] family from [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]] that owned [[Silica Tab]]. [[Garnak Fey]] was the head of this family during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Along with [[Timon Medon/Legends|Timon Medon]], the family had an impact on the unification of the [[Utai/Legends|Utai]] and [[Pau'an/Legends|Pau'an]] on [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
